calls.why: No pain note or rest drift on the last incline-press session, so the brake sees no fatigue grounds and defers the number to the progression seats.
Chest press moved cleanly at 142.5-157.5 three days ago with even set spacing and no fatigue note, so no recovery brake applies.
Logged clean at target reps with normal rest and no pain flag, nothing for the brake to act on.
Shoulder press held all sets at target with steady timestamps and no shoulder pain note, so no fatigue-based hold.
Small accessory logged without pain or rest-drift signal; the brake has no reason to intervene.
Triceps work progressed to 54 lb three days ago with normal rest and no elbow or fatigue note, so no recovery brake.
Last logged at 57.5 lb with no pain flag and clean timing, nothing for the brake to gate.
Rear-delt/rotator health work ran at 25.5 lb for full reps two days ago with no shoulder complaint, so the brake keeps hands off.
